title: Dizzy, Burning, and Fighting for the Win

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after the Kikuka Sho, it's reported that
Mihono Bourbon will be taking an extended
break due to an injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is upset not knowing when she'll
be able to race again, and Rice Shower, who has
always been chasing after her, is at a loss for how
to continue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Matikanetannhauser worries about both of
them, she gets a call from Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature expresses her gratitude to
Matikanetannhauser for all the times she has
given her courage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser remembers what Director
Akikawa told her. "It's because you're you that
they're so inspired!"
